rich.author: fangqiao1
rich.summary:
## 公司/团队介绍
Brand:
Magickbase => Magi(decision-making system), CKB(Common Knowledge Base), Base
responsibilities: Understanding business requirements and being responsible for product design and development;
Being responsible for the performance optimization of existing products;
Collaborate with Ops to deploy and maintain projects.
Comp. Sci or Comp. Eng degree or demonstrable skill and equivalent experience;
3+ years of practical experience working with Ruby, Ruby on Rails;
Fluently in English reading and writing.
A proven track record of open source projects or open source community contributions;
requirements: - Comp. Sci or Comp. Eng degree or demonstrable skill and equivalent experience; - 3+ years of practical experience working with Ruby, Ruby on Rails; - Experience with daily database design and development as well as optimization (MySQL, PostgreSQL); - Familiarity with Git/GitHub and RESTful standards; - Familiarity with underlying middleware, distributed technologies (including redis caching, messaging systems, etc.); - Fluently in English reading and writing. - A proven track record of open source projects or open source community contributions; - Experience with database tuning; - Experience with system performance optimization; - Experience with blockchain product development; - Experience with full-stack development;
compensation_notes: 远程办公:无论你在哪里,我们都可以并肩奋斗!
弹性工作:无论你是早睡早起的好孩子还是不怕黑眼圈的夜猫子，我们都可以并肩奋斗！
商业保险:除五险一金外,额外购买商业保险为你提供更多保障！
成长机会:我们关注你的个人成长，线上学习平台线下活动交流都在碗里！

sections.title: 公司/团队介绍
paragraphs: Magickbase => Magi(decision-making system), CKB(Common Knowledge Base), Base
Neuron, a full-node desktop ckb wallet
CKB Explorer, ckb explorer for the layer1
GwScan, godwoken explorer for the layer2
Axon Explorer, axon explorer for the layer2
Analyzing data from three platforms in the system for decision making and providing a controller for users to drive their assets.

sections.title: 地点
bullets: 工作地点：远程分布式办公

sections.title: Responsibilities
bullets: Understanding business requirements and being responsible for product design and development;
Being responsible for the performance optimization of existing products;
Collaborate with Ops to deploy and maintain projects.
Comp. Sci or Comp. Eng degree or demonstrable skill and equivalent experience;
3+ years of practical experience working with Ruby, Ruby on Rails;
Experience with daily database design and development as well as optimization (MySQL, PostgreSQL);
Familiarity with Git/GitHub and RESTful standards;
Familiarity with underlying middleware, distributed technologies (including redis caching, messaging systems, etc.);
Fluently in English reading and writing.
A proven track record of open source projects or open source community contributions;

narrative: ## 公司/团队介绍 Brand: Magickbase => Magi(decision-making system), CKB(Common Knowledge Base), Base

Products: Neuron, a full-node desktop ckb wallet CKB Explorer, ckb explorer for the layer1 GwScan, godwoken explorer for the layer2 Axon Explorer, axon explorer for the layer2 Vision: Analyzing data from three platforms in the system for decision making and providing a controller for users to drive their assets.
招聘地址： https://github.com/Magickbase/open-positions ## 薪资福利待遇 远程办公:无论你在哪里,我们都可以并肩奋斗! 弹性工作:无论你是早睡早起的好孩子还是不怕黑眼圈的夜猫子，我们都可以并肩奋斗！ 商业保险:除五险一金外,额外购买商业保险为你提供更多保障！ 成长机会:我们关注你的个人成长，线上学习平台线下活动交流都在碗里！ ## 地点
- 工作地点：远程分布式办公 - 联系方式：Mail us jobs@magickbase.com
- 是否全职：是 - 是否远程：是

- Understanding business requirements and being responsible for product design and development; - Being responsible for the performance optimization of existing products; - Maintaining blockchain related tools; - Collaborate with Ops to deploy and maintain projects.

- Comp. Sci or Comp. Eng degree or demonstrable skill and equivalent experience; - 3+ years of practical experience working with Ruby, Ruby on Rails; - Experience with daily database design and development as well as optimization (MySQL, PostgreSQL); - Familiarity with Git/GitHub and RESTful standards; - Familiarity with underlying middleware, distributed technologies (including redis caching, messaging systems, etc.); - Fluently in English reading and writing.

- A proven track record of open source projects or open source community contributions; - Experience with database tuning; - Experience with system performance optimization; - Experience with blockchain product development; - Experience with full-stack development;
